tasks.setup: deno run --allow-read --allow-run --allow-write src/bootstrap/config.ts && deno run --allow-read --allow-write scripts/gen-shape-docs.ts && deno run --allow-read --allow-run --allow-write --allow-env scripts/gen-version.ts
tasks.compile: deno task setup && deno compile --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env --allow-run -o dist/rune src/bootstrap/mod.ts
tasks.build: deno task compile && deno task build:rust && mkdir -p dist && cp lang/target/release/rune-lsp lang/target/release/rune-syntax dist/
tasks.verify: deno task check:lockstep && deno run -A scripts/verify.ts
tasks.test:e2e: deno test -A --unstable-raw-imports --config e2e/cake/deno.json e2e/cake/ && deno test -A --unstable-raw-imports --config e2e/checkout/deno.json e2e/checkout/
tasks.cake: deno run -A npm:playwright install chromium chromium-headless-shell && KEEP_BROWSER=1 KEEP_HEADED=1 deno test -A --unstable-raw-imports --config e2e/cake/deno.json e2e/cake/cake.e2e.test.ts
